$source-of-truth: docs/sprint-progress.json. Updated as agents return + commit. Read by apps/portal/Components/Pages/Sprint.razor.

currentSprint.name: Followup-2 Sweep (sequential)
currentSprint.goal: Drain the four-followup queue captured by the 2026-04-29 product calls. Per user call: 'all sequentially' — one agent at a time, in priority order. Specs in docs/product-calls-2026-04-29.md §3.

items.title: Deploy.ps1 for ERP V2 (same-Windows-host target)
items.notes: Deploy.ps1 408 lines, 6-phase, PS 5.1+7 compatible. NickERP_Inspection_Web :5410, NickERP_Portal :5400. v0 same-host build+copy; cross-host Y:\ variant documented for future.

items.title: app.user_id session setting + RLS user-isolation promotion
items.notes: TenantConnectionInterceptor + IUserContext + UserResolutionMiddleware. audit.notifications RLS now combines tenant + user filters with system-context OR clause. Tests 60→63.

items.title: IcumsGh envelope signing + key rotation
items.notes: HMAC-SHA256 detached signature; SetSystemContext rotation with overlap window. Per §3.4.

currentSprintNote: Sprint 9 — Followup-2 sweep, sequential execution per user call.

resolvedDecisions.title: ITenantContext.SetSystemContext mechanism
resolvedDecisions.resolution: option 2 — explicit IsSystem flag + SetSystemContext() + sentinel '-1' + per-table RLS opt-in clauses + system-context audit register

rollingMasterScope.drainableNote: Sprint 9 (Followup-2 sweep: FU-deploy, FU-userid, FU-host-status, FU-icums-signing) is in-flight as currentSprint. Remaining drainable: G2 NickFinance pathfinder, then P2 edge node. Specs in docs/product-calls-2026-04-29.md.

outOfScope.reason: User-driven; spawns its own master run when ready. Heads-up: untracked IInboundOutcomeAdapter.cs may reference the old AuthorityDocument DTO name — rename to AuthorityDocumentDto (FU-7) when resuming. docs/IMAGE-ANALYSIS-MODERNIZATION.md is the design source.
